elements.text: You have recently joined a class a few days before the add/drop deadline. When you come into the classroom you notice that most people have other friends to sit with. As you take a seat alone, you realize that there is always an opportunity make new friendships as the semester...

elements.name: new_opportunity_for_friends--social_situations--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
